name: jarbou3i-model
description: Jarbou3i Model: a trilingual dual-lens workbench with a preserved Strategic engine and a first-class Biopolitical Training Map v2.1 contract covering human functions, power systems, capture tests, distribution, evidence, agency, alternatives, and calibrated judgment.

scripts.test:ci:no-browser: npm run build:validator && npm run test:qa && npm run test:static && npm run test:platform && npm run test:platform:services && npm run test:provenance && npm run test:bio:v2 && npm run test:bio:integrity && npm run test:bio:graph && npm run test:bio:report && npm run test:schema && npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:parser && npm run test:layout:migration && npm run test:i18n:bio && npm run test:a11y:static && npm run test:ci:contract && npm run test:hygiene
scripts.test:browser:visual-audit: playwright test tests/visual-audit-evidence.spec.js --project=chromium --workers=1 && npm run test:evidence:visual-audit
scripts.test:browser:core: playwright test tests/a11y.spec.js tests/smoke.spec.js tests/rtl-mobile.spec.js tests/export-contract.spec.js tests/export-completeness.spec.js tests/lens-import-contract.spec.js tests/import-validation.spec.js tests/cross-locale-export-contract.spec.js tests/sample-language-contract.spec.js tests/reference-resolution.spec.js tests/relationship-explorer.spec.js tests/release-audit-matrix.spec.js tests/reflow-audit.spec.js
scripts.test:browser:hosted: playwright test tests/hosted-demo-evidence.spec.js --project=chromium --project=mobile-chrome --workers=1 && npm run test:evidence:hosted
scripts.test:browser: npm run test:browser:core && npm run test:browser:hosted && npm run test:browser:visual-audit
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:ci:no-browser && npm run test:ci:browser
